case_title: JASMINDER S. BANGA VS. FEEVA TECHNOLOGY INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANGA, JASMINDER S. AS TO DEFENDANT FEEVA TECHNOLOGY INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
